name: @cap/release-cache-worker
description: Public, cache-only Cloudflare Worker that transparently proxies GitHub's releases/latest for a validated owner/repo and serves it through the CF edge cache. Fronts the api's update-availability check (GITHUB_API_BASE) to converge fleet traffic and survive GitHub blips within the cache window. Pure cache: no auth, no token, no telemetry, no payload rewrite.
